whyMonitoring.headline: Measure first, upgrade second
points: Whole-building bills hide which circuits, appliances, or shifts waste energy.
Submetering and sensors turn vague bills into actionable kWh, gas, and water signals.
Monitoring supports grant and loan applications — lenders like measured baselines and M&V.
Leak, temperature, and runtime alerts catch problems before they become costly repairs.

sensorTypes.name: Electricity / power
sensorTypes.measures: kW, kWh per circuit or appliance
sensorTypes.homeUse: Heating, hot water, EV charger, always-on loads

sensorTypes.name: Temperature
sensorTypes.restaurantUse: Cold storage compliance and drift alerts

sensorTypes.name: Runtime / current
sensorTypes.homeUse: Immersion or auxiliary heat stuck on

restaurant.label: Restaurant
quickWins: Log peak lunch electricity vs overnight baseline
Alert on cold-room drift before stock loss
Compare sites if you run multiple locations
restaurant.exampleSites: Wok To Walk Amsterdam sites in company-map-buildings.json

home.label: Home
prioritySensors: Smart meter or clamp meter on incomer
quickWins: Find standby loads and old fridge creep
Validate heat-pump performance vs gas backup
Size battery or solar with real load shapes

office.label: Office / small business
quickWins: Catch HVAC running in empty buildings
Split tenant energy for fair recharge
Prioritize retrofit zones with highest kWh/m²

productReviewThemes.title: Submetering & circuit monitors
productReviewThemes.reviewAngle: Look for clamp or DIN-rail meters that split cookline vs HVAC — granularity beats one bill.

productReviewThemes.title: Smart meter visibility
productReviewThemes.reviewAngle: Half-hourly or daily data from your supplier portal is a free first step before buying hardware.

productReviewThemes.title: Water monitoring & leak alerts
productReviewThemes.reviewAngle: Flow sensors on dishwash and prep lines often pay back faster than another efficiency brochure.

productReviewThemes.title: Cold chain & refrigeration monitoring
productReviewThemes.reviewAngle: Temperature logging protects stock and proves compliance — pair with efficient ETL refrigeration upgrades.

productReviewThemes.title: HVAC & extraction runtime
productReviewThemes.reviewAngle: Current sensors on fan motors reveal overnight waste — common restaurant quick win.
